description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow should have three jobs: macos_catalina running on macOS 10.15, ros_dashing running on ubuntu-latest with an ubuntu:bionic container, and ubuntu_bionic also running on ubuntu-latest with an ubuntu:bionic container. Each job should check out the code, run a setup script, and then run a build and test script.
